betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Hydraulic Fracking Tower§f extracts oil from depleted or difficult deposits.

§eFunction:§f
• Accesses oil inaccessible to derricks/pumpjacks
• Uses hydraulic pressure to fracture rock
• Extracts remaining oil reserves

§eSide Effects:§f
• Creates §bOily Dirt§f in environment
• Environmental contamination (can be processed for Arsenic)

§aTip:§f Use when conventional extraction is depleted.
